# technitium_admin_group (Resource)

Manages an admin group on a Technitium DNS Server.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the admin group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the admin group.
- `members` (String) Comma-separated list of usernames that are members of this group.
